fallback_contact.name: Bert Krahn
fallback_contact.title: President
fallback_contact.rationale: First-generation owner of a 15+ year commercial GC. In a firm this size, Bert is functionally the lead estimator. Barbara Krahn is listed as Partner. Landon Krahn (LinkedIn-associated, likely family) is also at WinnPro.

needs_review_flags: Family-run shop — 'Krahn' surname pattern suggests succession in progress; Landon Krahn (LinkedIn) may be the next-gen estimator-in-training; worth a direct LinkedIn message.
Phone: 1-204-989-5941; Email: info@winnpro.ca; Address: Unit A - 48 Speers Rd, Winnipeg.
WinnPro scope = food industries, industrial, retail, commercial offices — strong fit for Ashrah.

sources.claim: WinnPro Construction commercial scope and contact info
Bert Krahn President, Barbara Krahn Partner
